merged_events.event_description: The American Embassy at Maseru was established upon Lesotho's attainment of independence, with Richard St. F. Post as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on October 4, 1966, when the American Embassy at Maseru was established with Richard St. F. Post as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

merged_events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Lesotho established, with Richard St Francis Post serving as the first Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Richard St Francis Post, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1966-10. Left post: 1968-07.

matched.notes: Both extracted events refer to the establishment of the U.S. Embassy at Maseru on Lesotho's independence. RDCR (Event 0) gives the precise date 1966-10-04; POCOM (Event 1) gives 1966-10 (month-level precision only). Dates are fully consistent.
